14: Fourthly-Judgment. Psalm 89:14: "Justice and judgment are the habitation of thy throne." Deuteronomy 32:4: "He is the Rock, his work is perfect; for all his ways are judgment: a God of truth and without iniquity, just and right is he." Psalm 9:7: "But the Lord shall endure for ever. He hath prepared his throne for judgment." Psalm 9:16: "The Lord is known by the judgment which he executeth." (Craig J. Ostler and Joseph fielding Mc Conkie, Revelations of the Restoration)
52: This psalm was composed by Moses, the man of God, some time after God had sentenced the Hebrews to wandering and death in the wilderness, Num. 14.
